|species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Dathomirian">In the article ''[[Everything You Always Wanted to Know about the Nightsisters but Were Afraid to Ask]]'', published in [[Star Wars Insider 122|''Star Wars Insider'' 122]], the [[Holocron continuity database]] keeper [[Leland Chee]] confirmed the early [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] statement that regular [[Witches of Dathomir]] are [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Lee also established that every individuals of the [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian species]] are exclusively members of the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]].</ref>

{{Quote|On its brightest day, Dathomir is a shadow world. But the infernal nightcloak filled pure skies with black blood and swallowed the moon we worshiped.|Ute Raek|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>}}
'''Ute Raek''' was a [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] priestess for the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology" />
